description: Replays multiple existing commands in parallel or sequential order. Accepts variable references to existing commands. Defaults based on argument count: single argument uses sequence mode, multiple arguments use parallel mode. Can explicitly specify mode with type() and control duration with t(). Optionally accepts media() for audio playback.
utility: Replay existing commands in parallel or sequence, optionally with audio

arguments.name: commandVars
arguments.description: One or more variable references to existing command/shape expressions to replay

arguments.name: type
arguments.description: Execution mode: 'parallel' plays simultaneously, 'sequence' plays one after another

arguments.name: media
arguments.description: Audio to play in parallel with the replayed commands

alternates.description: Play multiple commands simultaneously (default for 2+ args)

examples.scenario: Parallel play of points and labels for ellipse
examples.expression: play_2 = play(label_2, point_2, point_1, label_1,label_7,label_8, type(parallel))

examples.scenario: Play deferred polygon animation in parallel
